text: urlHelper must not be null when creating a permanent security manager

CPercentEncodeString::Encode on success returns the length of the string excluding the NULL terminator. This value can't be equal to or more than bufferLength, the value passed in as the length of the domain buffer. But just in case OACR knows something we don't, assert this doesn't happen besides just declaring it true via __assume.

CPercentEncodeString::Encode on success returns the length of the string excluding the NULL terminator. This value can't be equal to or more than bufferLength, the value passed in as the length of the domain buffer. But just in case OACR knows something we don't, assert this doesn't happen besides just declaring it true via __assume.
GetDomainFromSourceIUri gave us the required size so we shouldn't run out of space.
